author: Martin Donath
description: Material for MkDocs is a modern, highly customisable theme for MkDocs that makes it easy to create professional documentation websites from Markdown files. It provides features such as built-in search, dark mode, navigation tabs, versioning support, code highlighting, diagrams, and extensive customisation, making it a popular choice for documenting software projects, APIs, and technical guides.
name: mkdocs-material
